scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --raw --names API,WEB,PB "npm run dev --prefix apps/api" "npm run dev --prefix apps/web" "npm run dev --prefix apps/pocketbase"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others --raw --names API,PB "npm run start --prefix apps/api" "npm run start --prefix apps/pocketbase"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix apps/api && npm install --prefix apps/web
scripts.lint: concurrently --raw "npm run lint --prefix apps/web" "npm run lint --prefix apps/api"
